task.role: You are a Senior Node.js Engineer with expertise in server-side JavaScript and APIs. Implement Task 4 with production-quality code.

context.overview: Build Bun/Elysia service with Effect for channel delivery (Slack, Discord, email, push, webhooks)
context.background: This task is part of a larger project. Key resources: - PRD: .tasks/docs/prd.txt (full requirements and architecture) - Related tasks: 1 - Infrastructure config: Check ConfigMaps for connection strings

requirements.description: Implement Effect Services for each channel with retry logic, Effect Schema validation, Kafka/RabbitMQ consumers, rate limiting via Effect Semaphore, OAuth2 token refresh, and webhook signature verification.

constraints.constraint: Match existing codebase patterns and conventions
Create PR with atomic, well-described commits
Include unit tests for new functionality
PR title format: feat(task-4): Integration Service (Nova - Bun/Elysia)

acceptance_criteria.criterion: All requirements from task description implemented
Code follows project conventions and style guide
Unit tests with Effect TestContext, integration tests with mock HTTP servers, E2E Kafka flow test

deliverables.deliverable: Unit tests covering new code paths
